description: Marriage contract (ketubba). Fragment (left side only). Location: Fustat. Dating: ca. 1030 CE. Bride: Malika/Milka (מלכה). Groom: ʿAllūn b. Ṣeda[qa]. The dowry includes a house in Cairo. Written and signed by the cantor Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya. Other witnesses are: […] b. Yeshaʿya, [ʿAm]ram b. Yefet, and [...] b. Menashshe. (Information from Goitein’s index card and CUDL.)
